communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I request the following records related to the department’s Flock Safety system, current as of the date this request is fulfilled: Records related to the department’s Flock Safety system: 
1. A list of network share settings that include: 
1a. Flock networks shared with me 
1b. Networks that I’m sharing Please provide these records in their original electronic, machine-readable format (e.g., CSV or spreadsheet files where applicable). 

Please do not redirect me to a transparency portal or dashboard in lieu of producing the underlying records. 

This request is made for non-commercial purposes, and the responsive records will be made available to the general public. If any portion of the requested records is withheld or redacted, please cite the specific statutory exemption relied upon. 

If there are any anticipated costs, please notify me in advance. Thank you for your attention to this request. Sincerely,

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I hereby request that your agency produce for inspection and copying the following public record(s) within three (3) business days of receipt of this request, as required by law: Records Requested: The complete Flock Safety Event Log from the earliest available date through the date this record is received. I request that these records be provided in electronic format (e.g., PDF, CSV, or native file format) via email, if possible. If electronic production is not feasible, please notify me and I will make arrangements for physical inspection or copying. If there are any fees associated with the search, retrieval, or copying of these records, please provide an itemized fee estimate before processing this request. If the total cost is less than $25.00, please proceed without prior notification. If any portion of this request is denied, in whole or in part, please cite the specific statutory exemption(s) relied upon for each denial and notify me of the right to appeal such denial, as required by O.C.G.A. § 50-18-72. Please acknowledge receipt of this request in writing as soon as practicable. Under O.C.G.A. § 50-18-71(b)(1)(A), your agency must produce the requested records or deny this request within three (3) business days of receipt. Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar

communications.subject: Illinois Freedom of Information Act. Request: Work Unit ALPR Coordinator emails
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Illinois Freedom of Information Act., I hereby request the following records:

All emails to or from the "Work Unit ALPR Coordinator" that is mentioned in https://isp.illinois.gov/StaticFiles/docs/DepartmentDirectives/ENF-051%20DIR.pdf: "The Deputy Director of the Division of Criminal Investigation (DCI) will designate a Statewide ALPR Coordinator, who will coordinate directly with the Division ALPR Liaison."

please limit the scope of this request to all emails sent/received from Jan 1, 2024 through the present date. please note that this is not the same request as the request for the statewide alpr coordinator emails.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

LPL
